signals.npcLine: City-wide sensors report small gains in digital asset flow.
signals.questPulse: Markets flicker; shadows grow richer under synthetic moons.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto shadows pulse with cautious optimism across neon grids.
signals.clueEvent: Low signal surge hints at hidden data spike.

signals.npcLine: Warning: pervasive fear causes market inertia among netrunners.
signals.questPulse: Fear index climbs; silent networks brace for impact.
signals.worldFeed: Trader bots stall; darknet whispers of instability rise.
signals.clueEvent: Sentiment dive triggers risk protocol; secure your tech.

signals.npcLine: Code drops show rising chatter on obscure tokens: CHIP, PENGU.
signals.questPulse: Unseen players shift assets; tech clues scatter in feeds.
signals.worldFeed: Data packets pulse with talk of rare altcoins on markets.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden momentum detected in low-profile digital currencies.

signals.npcLine: RAVE, HYPE, ASTEROID tokens beacon—seek their secrets in the dust.
signals.questPulse: Buzzing nodes hint at volatile caches ripe for harvest.
signals.worldFeed: New cryptos stir chaos near the sector’s edge.
signals.clueEvent: Strange spikes in token activity call for deep probe.

signals.npcLine: Old netrunner murmurs: 'Fear drives the grid's heartbeat low.'
signals.questPulse: Ghosts of crashed circuits warn of coming dark tides.
signals.worldFeed: Street vendors sell whispers of looming data storms.
signals.clueEvent: Low morale detected; trust flickers in network nodes.
